name: spreadsheet-peek
description: Adds proactive spreadsheet previews plus a local MCP server for structured and visual inline workbook inspection.

interface.shortDescription: Preview spreadsheets with wolfxl before agents process them.
interface.longDescription: Adds proactive spreadsheet preview behavior plus a local read-only MCP server. Codex can use the skill rules for portable wolfxl peek previews and the MCP server for structured workbook data, readable text fallback output, and inline viewer resources where supported.
defaultPrompt: Preview this spreadsheet before processing it.
Show this workbook with Spreadsheet Peek.
